panels.title: 模型调用次数趋势（每5分钟）

用户活跃排行（调用次数）
工具缓存命中/未命中统计
工具调用响应时间对比（缓存 vs 非缓存）

工具调用响应时间提升比例

targets.expr: sum by (tool_name) ((ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_sum{tool_name!=""} and on(tool_name) ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_sum{from_cache="false"}) / (ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_count{tool_name!=""} and on(tool_name) ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_count{from_cache="false"} + 1e-10) - (ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_sum{tool_name!=""} and on(tool_name) ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_sum{from_cache="true"}) / (ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_count{tool_name!=""} and on(tool_name) ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_count{from_cache="true"} + 1e-10)) / ((ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_sum{tool_name!=""} and on(tool_name) ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_sum{from_cache="false"}) / (ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_count{tool_name!=""} and on(tool_name) ai_tool_response_duration_seconds_count{from_cache="false"} + 1e-10) + 1e-10)

panels.title: 各工具响应时间提升比例趋势
